attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring or one-time remote agent ("run this every Monday", "open a cleanup PR for X in 2 weeks"), or to manage existing routines. ALSO OFFER PROACTIVELY: after you finish work that has a natural future follow-up, end your reply with a one-line offer to schedule a background agent to do it. Strong signals: a feature flag / gate / experiment / staged rollout was just shipped (offer a one-time agent in ~2 weeks to open a cleanup PR or evaluate results), a new alert/monitor was created (offer a recurring agent to triage it), a TODO/migration with a "remove once X" condition was left behind (offer a one-time agent to do the removal). Skip the offer for refactors, bug fixes, and anything that is done once it ships. Name a concrete action and cadence ("in 2 weeks", "every Monday") and only offer when the run just succeeded — do not pitch a schedule for something that has not happened yet.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.
- playwright-cli: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, test web applications, or extract information from web pages.
- ticket: ClickUp チケットの取得・作成・更新を行う。チケット操作（表示・作成・更新）が要求された時に必ず使用する。引数としてチケット ID を受け取る。省略時は現在のブランチ名から自動抽出する。
- frontend-design: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
- commit: git のステージの内容を元にコミットを行います
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.content:
1	package commands
2	
3	import (
4		"encoding/json"
5		"errors"
6		"log"
7		"net/http"
8	
9		"github.com/google/uuid"
10		"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/response"
11		"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
12	)
13	
14	const (
15		errorCodeEnrollmentForbidden = "ENROLLMENT_FORBIDDEN"
16		errorCodeCourseNotFound      = "COURSE_NOT_FOUND"
17		errorCodeTopicNotFound       = "TOPIC_NOT_FOUND"
18	)
19	
20	type UpdateEnrollmentHandler struct {
21		usecase UpdateEnrollmentUsecaseInterface
22	}
23	
24	func NewUpdateEnrollmentHandler(usecase UpdateEnrollmentUsecaseInterface) *UpdateEnrollmentHandler {
25		return &UpdateEnrollmentHandler{usecase: usecase}
26	}
27	
28	type patchEnrollmentRequestBody struct {
29		TopicId string `json:"topicId"`
30		Status  string `json:"status"`
31	}
32	
33	type patchEnrollmentResponse struct {
34		TopicId string `json:"topicId"`
35		Status  string `json:"status"`
36	}
37	
38	func (h *UpdateEnrollmentHandler) PatchEnrollmentHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
39		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
40	
41		userIdStr := r.PathValue("userID")
42		if userIdStr == "" {
43			response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "userID must be required")
44			return
45		}
46		userId, err := uuid.Parse(userIdStr)
47		if err != nil {
48			response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "userID must be UUID format")
49			return
50		}
51	
52		courseIdStr := r.PathValue("courseId")
53		if courseIdStr == "" {
54			response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "courseId must be required")
55			return
56		}
57		courseId, err := uuid.Parse(courseIdStr)
58		if err != nil {
59			response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "courseId must be UUID format")
60			return
61		}
62	
63		var body patchEnrollmentRequestBody
64		defer r.Body.Close()
65		if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&body); err != nil {
66			response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "body parameter is invalid json format")
67			return
68		}
69	
70		if body.TopicId == "" {
71			response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "topicId must be required")
72			return
73		}
74		topicId, err := uuid.Parse(body.TopicId)
75		if err != nil {
76			response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "topicId must be UUID format")
77			return
78		}
79	
80		if body.Status == "" {
81			response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "status must be required")
82			return
83		}
84	
85		result, err := h.usecase.execute(r.Context(), UpdateEnrollmentParams{
86			userId:   userId,
87			courseId: courseId,
88			topicId:  topicId,
89			status:   body.Status,
90		})
91		if err != nil {
92			switch {
93			case errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidProgressStatus):
94				response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusBadRequest, response.InputValidationError, "status must be IN_PROGRESS or COMPLETED")
95			case errors.Is(err, pgx.ErrNoRows):
96				response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusNotFound, errorCodeCourseNotFound, "course not found")
97			case errors.Is(err, ErrEnrollmentNotAllowed):
98				response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusForbidden, errorCodeEnrollmentForbidden, "this course is not enrollable")
99			case errors.Is(err, ErrTopicNotFoundInCourse):
100				response.WriteErrorResponse(w, http.StatusNotFound, errorCodeTopicNotFound, "topic not found in course")
101			default:
102				log.Printf("PatchEnrollmentHandler error: %v", err)
103				response.WriteInternalServerErrorResponse(w)
104			}
105			return
106		}
107	
108		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
109		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(patchEnrollmentResponse{
110			TopicId: result.TopicId,
111			Status:  result.Status,
112		})
113	}
114

content.content:
1	package commands
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"encoding/json"
6		"time"
7	
8		"github.com/google/uuid"
9		"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
10		"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgtype"
11	)
12	
13	type SqrcCourseRepository struct {
14		sqrc db.Querier
15	}
16	
17	func NewSqrcCourseRepository(q db.Querier) *SqrcCourseRepository {
18		return &SqrcCourseRepository{sqrc: q}
19	}
20	
21	func (repository *SqrcCourseRepository) getCourseByCourseId(ctx context.Context, courseId uuid.UUID) (Course, error) {
22		var courseIdUuid pgtype.UUID
23	
24		if err := courseIdUuid.Scan(courseId.String()); err != nil {
25			return Course{}, err
26		}
27	
28		courseRaw, err := repository.sqrc.GetCourseById(ctx, courseIdUuid)
29		if err != nil {
30			return Course{}, err
31		}
32	
33		return toCourse(courseRaw), nil
34	}
35	
36	func toCourse(raw db.GetCourseByIdRow) Course {
37		var tags []string
38		json.Unmarshal(raw.Tags, &tags)
39	
40		type topicRaw struct {
41			CourseSectionTopicId string `json:"course_section_topic_id"`
42			Title                string `json:"title"`
43			Description          string `json:"description"`
44			Prerequisites        string `json:"prerequisites"`
45			Knowledge            string `json:"knowledge"`
46			Flow                 string `json:"flow"`
47			Quiz                 string `json:"quiz"`
48			CompletionCriteria   string `json:"completion_criteria"`
49		}
50		type sectionRaw struct {
51			CourseSectionId string     `json:"course_section_id"`
52			Title           string     `json:"title"`
53			Description     string     `json:"description"`
54			Topics          []topicRaw `json:"topics"`
55		}
56	
57		var sectionsRaw []sectionRaw
58		json.Unmarshal(raw.Sections, &sectionsRaw)
59	
60		sections := make([]Section, len(sectionsRaw))
61		for i, s := range sectionsRaw {
62			topics := make([]Topic, len(s.Topics))
63			for j, t := range s.Topics {
64				topics[j] = Topic{
65					topicId:            t.CourseSectionTopicId,
66					title:              t.Title,
67					description:        t.Description,
68					prerequisites:      t.Prerequisites,
69					knowledge:          t.Knowledge,
70					flow:               t.Flow,
71					quiz:               t.Quiz,
72					completionCriteria: t.CompletionCriteria,
73					number:             j,
74				}
75			}
76			sections[i] = Section{
77				sectionId:   s.CourseSectionId,
78				title:       s.Title,
79				description: s.Description,
80				number:      i,
81				topics:      topics,
82			}
83		}
84	
85		var publishedAt *string
86		if raw.PublishedAt.Valid {
87			t := raw.PublishedAt.Time.Format(time.RFC3339)
88			publishedAt = &t
89		}
90	
91		return Course{
92			courseId:      raw.CourseID.String(),
93			title:         raw.Title,
94			description:   raw.Description,
95			slug:          raw.Slug,
96			tags:          tags,
97			publishStatus: raw.PublishStatus,
98			category: Category{
99				categoryId: raw.CategoryID.String(),
100				name:       raw.CategoryName,
101			},
102			publishedAt: publishedAt,
103			author: Author{
104				authorId: raw.AuthorID.String(),
105				name:     raw.AuthorName,
106			},
107			visibility: raw.Visibility,
108			sections:   sections,
109		}
110	}
111

content.text:
DDD 観点で更新系（update-enrollment）を中心にレビューします。

## 集約境界の問題

**1. `Course` 集約に他集約がエンティティとして含まれている**
- `course.entity.go:29-37` の `Author` / `Category` は別集約のはず。集約をまたぐ参照は ID（あるいは小さな VO）に留めるのが原則。現状は name までフルロードしており、Course 集約の責務・境界が肥大化。
- 進捗更新ユースケース 1 回のために Course の Section/Topic/Author/Category/Tags まで全ロードしている（`course.sqrc-repository.go:21`）。集約が大きすぎる兆候。

**2. `EnrollmentProgress` の概念が混乱している**
- 型名 `EnrollmentProgress`、ファイル名 `progress.entity.go`、テーブル `user_topic_progress`、リポジトリ `UserTopicProgressRepository` と全部ずれている。
- 実体は「1 トピックの進捗 1 レコード」なので **`TopicProgress`** が正しい。「Enrollment」(コース受講そのもの) とは別概念。
- 本来は `Enrollment` 集約 (コース受講中の状態 + 全体の進捗管理) を立て、その中で `TopicProgress` を扱う、または明確に別集約として分離すべき。

**3. `checkEnrollable` の意味と呼び出し箇所のミスマッチ**
- `course.entity.go:56` は「公開済み or 自分の作成コース」かを見ており、これは **受講開始 (Enroll)** 可否のチェック。
- 進捗更新時に本来見るべきは「このユーザーがこのコースに enrollment を持っているか」。Enrollment 集約がないため Course 側のチェックが代用になっている。設計上のズレ。

## エンティティの不変条件が守られていない

`progress.entity.go`:
- `NewEnrollmentProgress` が status 空のまま生成可能。usecase 側で必ず `Start/Finish` を呼ぶ前提コードになっている (`update-enrollment.usecase.go:59-67`)。エンティティ単体で不正状態を作れる。
- 状態遷移ルールが無い（COMPLETED → IN_PROGRESS への巻き戻しが自由に可能）。状態機械を持つドメインなら、`Start()/Complete()` 内で前条件を検証すべき。
- ファクトリを `StartTopicProgress(userId, topicId)` / `CompleteTopicProgress(...)` のように状態を必須にする、または `NewTopicProgress(..., status)` で渡すのが安全。

## メソッド命名

| 現在 | 推奨 | 理由 |
|---|---|---|
| `getCourseByCourseId` | `findByID` / `getByID` | レシーバが `CourseRepository` なので `Course` は型で表現される。冗長 |
| `Finish()` | `Complete()` | ステータスが `ProgressStatusCompleted` なので動詞も揃える |
| `upsert` (Repository) | `save` | DDD ではドメインが「保存」したいだけ。upsert は永続化の技術詳細 |
| `EnrollmentProgress` | `TopicProgress` | 実体に合わせる |
| `checkEnrollable` | (用途次第) `ensureEnrollableBy` / 進捗更新側からは `enrollment.assertActive()` 等 | 「チェック」より意図のある語に |

## 値オブジェクトの欠落

- `UpdateEnrollmentParams.status string` (`update-enrollment.usecase.go:13`) — usecase 内で `ProgressStatus(params.status)` にキャスト後 default で `ErrInvalidProgressStatus`。本来はハンドラー境界で VO へパースし、usecase は `ProgressStatus` を受け取る。「不正な status」はドメインまで持ち込まない。
- `userId/courseId/topicId` も `uuid.UUID` ↔ `string` 変換が散見。`UserID`, `CourseID`, `TopicID` の型を切ると `course.findTopicById` 内の `topic.topicId == topicId.String()` 比較なども綺麗になる。

## ファイル・型の配置

- `course.entity.go` 1 ファイルに Topic, Section, Author, Category, Course を同居。Topic/Section は Course 集約内なので同居 OK。Author/Category は別集約参照なら別ファイル＋小さな VO に。
- `findTopicById` を Course ルートに置くのは妥当（集約外からは集約ルート経由でアクセス、の原則に合う）。

## 優先度サマリ

1. **高**: `EnrollmentProgress` → `TopicProgress` リネームと概念整理（Enrollment 集約を立てるかの判断含む）
2. **高**: 状態遷移の不変条件をエンティティに閉じ込める（factory での status 必須化、不正遷移の拒否）
3. **中**: `checkEnrollable` の責務を「受講開始可否」と「進捗更新可否」に分離。Update 時は Enrollment の存在チェックへ
4. **中**: Author / Category を別集約参照に。Course 集約の肥大化を解消（必要なら進捗更新用に軽量クエリ／別 read model）
5. **中**: `status` の VO 化と境界での parse、ID の VO 化
6. **低**: `Finish` → `Complete`、`upsert` → `save`、`getCourseByCourseId` → `findByID` などの命名整理

message.content: Enrollment 集約を立てて、そのコース全体の進捗状態を持つような形にするのはどうかな

content.text:
良い方向性だと思います。ただし設計判断が複数あるので整理します。

## モデルのイメージ

```go
// 集約ルート
type Enrollment struct {
    enrollmentId    uuid.UUID
    userId          uuid.UUID
    courseId        uuid.UUID
    enrolledAt      time.Time
    topicProgresses []TopicProgress // 集約内エンティティ
}

// 集約内エンティティ
type TopicProgress struct {
    topicId   uuid.UUID
    status    ProgressStatus
    updatedAt time.Time
}

func (e *Enrollment) UpdateTopicProgress(topicId uuid.UUID, status ProgressStatus) error {
    // 状態遷移ルール、重複作成防止などをここに集約
}

func (e *Enrollment) IsCompleted() bool { /* 全 topic が COMPLETED か */ }
func (e *Enrollment) ProgressRate() float64 { /* 導出 */ }
```

## 得られるもの

1. **不変条件の凝集**: 「同 topic 進捗 1 件」「不正な状態遷移を拒否」「未受講のコースに進捗を書き込めない」を集約境界で守れる
2. **責務の明確化**: `Course.checkEnrollable` の流用が消え、進捗更新時のチェックは `Enrollment` の存在で表現できる
3. **読み出しの凝集**: 「コース全体の完了率」「最後に触った topic」「修了判定」が Enrollment ルートで完結 → 一覧 API の Read Model も組み立てやすい
4. **概念整理**: `EnrollmentProgress` という曖昧な型がなくなり、`Enrollment` (受講記録) と `TopicProgress` (1 トピックの進捗) に明確に分離

## 事前に決めるべき設計判断

**1. 集約サイズ**
- topic 数が大きくなる講座だと、毎回全 TopicProgress をロード/保存するのは重い。
- 想定上限が数十程度なら問題なし。100+ なら「Enrollment は薄く持ち、TopicProgress は別集約 + ID 参照」のほうが現実的。
- 今のサービス規模感ならまず**同一集約で OK**、後で重くなったら分離、で良いと思います。

**2. 受講開始 (Enroll) ユースケースの扱い**
- 明示的に `POST /enrollments` を立てる方式 (推奨): 受講開始の意思決定が明確になり、Enrollment 集約のライフサイクルが綺麗
- Lazy 方式 (進捗更新時に Enrollment がなければ自動作成): API 数は減るが、「受講中とは何か」が曖昧になる
- 既に「受講中講座一覧」があるので、明示的 Enroll の方が UX とドメイン両面で素直

**3. Course の topic との整合**
- 「topic がコース内に存在するか」は Course 集約の責務。Enrollment 単独では検証できない。
- 進捗更新ユースケースは「Enrollment 集約を更新する処理」+「Course 集約に topic 存在を問い合わせる処理」の組み合わせになる → ドメインサービス or ユースケース層で協調
- Course 側で topic が削除された時の振る舞い (孤児 TopicProgress を残す/消す) もルール定義が必要

**4. テーブル設計**
- `enrollments` テーブル新設 (id, user_id, course_id, enrolled_at, UNIQUE(user_id, course_id))
- 既存 `user_topic_progress` に `enrollment_id` を FK 追加
- 既存データのマイグレーションは「user_id + course_id でグルーピングして enrollments を生成、user_topic_progress.enrollment_id を埋める」

## ユースケース層の流れ (再構成後イメージ)

```go
func (u UpdateTopicProgressUsecase) execute(ctx, params) (Result, error) {
    enrollment, err := u.enrollmentRepo.findByUserAndCourse(ctx, params.userId, params.courseId)
    // → なければ ErrNotEnrolled (受講していない)

    course, err := u.courseRepo.findByID(ctx, params.courseId)
    if _, err := course.findTopicById(params.topicId); err != nil { ... } // topic 存在チェック

    if err := enrollment.UpdateTopicProgress(params.topicId, params.status); err != nil { ... }
    // → 状態遷移ルール違反等

    return u.enrollmentRepo.save(ctx, enrollment)
}
```

`Course.checkEnrollable` は不要になり、Enroll ユースケース側にだけ残ります（公開コースか／自分のコースか の判定）。

## 進める場合の順序提案

1. `enrollments` テーブル + マイグレーション設計
2. `Enrollment` / `TopicProgress` 集約のモデリング (状態遷移ルール込み)
3. `POST /enrollments` (Enroll) ユースケース新設
4. 現 `PATCH /users/:userId/enrollments/:courseId` を「Enrollment.UpdateTopicProgress」呼び出しに差し替え
5. 既存の Course 集約から Author/Category を ID 参照に縮小

ステップ 1〜4 をこの PR 内で進めるか、別 PR に切るかはどうしますか？

content.text: 了解。受講開始 API は別 PR 前提で、この PR では「Enrollment 集約 + テーブル + PATCH の差し替え」を進めます。まず既存のテーブル構造とマイグレーション、sqlc クエリを確認します。

-- USERS
CREATE TABLE users (
    user_id UUID,
    nickname TEXT NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_users PRIMARY KEY (user_id)
);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_users_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON users FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

-- APIKEYS
CREATE TABLE apikeys (
    key_hash TEXT,
    user_id UUID NOT NULL,
    plain_suffix TEXT NOT NULL,
    expired_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_apikeys PRIMARY KEY (key_hash),
    CONSTRAINT fk_apikeys_user_id FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_apikeys_user_id ON apikeys USING BTREE (user_id);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_apikeys_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON apikeys FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

-- COURSE SECTION
CREATE TABLE course_sections (
    course_section_id UUID,
    course_id UUID NOT NULL,
    index SMALLINT NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_course_sections PRIMARY KEY (course_section_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(course_id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_course_sections_course_id_index UNIQUE (course_id, index) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
);

CREATE INDEX idx_course_sections_course_id ON course_sections USING BTREE (course_id);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_course_sections_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON course_sections FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

-- COURSE SECTION TOPIC
CREATE TABLE course_section_topics (
    course_section_topic_id UUID,
    -- course_id は course_section と JOIN することで辿れるが、クエリ効率のため非正規化
    course_id UUID NOT NULL,
    course_section_id UUID NOT NULL,
    index SMALLINT NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_course_section_topics PRIMARY KEY (course_section_topic_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_topics_course_id FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(course_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_topics_course_section_id FOREIGN KEY (course_section_id) REFERENCES course_sections(course_section_id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_course_section_topics_course_section_id_index UNIQUE (course_section_id, index) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
);

CREATE INDEX idx_course_section_topics_course_id ON course_section_topics USING BTREE (course_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_course_section_topics_course_section_id ON course_section_topics USING BTREE (course_section_id);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_course_section_topics_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON course_section_topics FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

CREATE TABLE user_topic_progresses (
    -- クエリ効率のため非正規化
    course_id UUID NOT NULL,
    course_section_id UUID NOT NULL,
    course_section_topic_id UUID NOT NULL,
    user_id UUID NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_user_topic_progresses PRIMARY KEY (course_section_topic_id, user_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_id FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(course_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_id FOREIGN KEY (course_section_id) REFERENCES course_sections(course_section_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_topic_id FOREIGN KEY (course_section_topic_id) REFERENCES course_section_topics(course_section_topic_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_user_id FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id)
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN user_topic_progresses.status IS 'IN_PROGRESS = 開始済み, COMPLETED = 完了済み, 開始していない場合はレコード自体がないので値として持たない';

CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_course_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (course_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_course_section_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (course_section_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_course_section_topic_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (course_section_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_user_id ON user_topic_progresses USING BTREE (user_id);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_user_topic_progress_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON user_topic_progresses FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

file.content:
-- name: GetEnrollmentsByUserID :many
SELECT
    courses.course_id AS "courseId",
    courses.title
FROM
    user_topic_progresses
    JOIN course_section_topics ON user_topic_progresses.course_section_topic_id = course_section_topics.course_section_topic_id
    JOIN course_sections ON course_section_topics.course_section_id = course_sections.course_section_id
    JOIN courses ON course_sections.course_id = courses.course_id
WHERE
    user_topic_progresses.user_id = @UserID :: uuid
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id,
    courses.title
ORDER BY
    MAX(user_topic_progresses._updated_at) DESC;

-- name: GetCourseAuthorityById :one
SELECT
    publish_status,
    author_id
FROM
    courses
WHERE
    courses.course_id = @CourseID;

-- name: GetCourseStructureWithProgress :one
WITH section_agg AS (
    SELECT
        sections.course_id,
        sections.course_section_id,
        sections.title,
        sections.index,
        COALESCE(
            jsonb_agg(
                jsonb_build_object(
                    'topicId',
                    topics.course_section_topic_id,
                    'title',
                    topics.title,
                    'status',
                    COALESCE(progresses.status, 'NOT_STARTED'),
                    'index',
                    topics.index
                )
                ORDER BY
                    topics.index
            ) FILTER (
                WHERE
                    topics.course_section_topic_id IS NOT NULL
            ),
            '[]' :: jsonb
        ) AS topics
    FROM
        course_sections AS sections
        LEFT JOIN course_section_topics AS topics ON sections.course_section_id = topics.course_section_id
        LEFT JOIN user_topic_progresses AS progresses ON progresses.course_section_topic_id = topics.course_section_topic_id
        AND progresses.user_id = @UserID
    WHERE
        sections.course_id = @CourseID
    GROUP BY
        sections.course_id,
        sections.course_section_id,
        sections.index,
        sections.title
)
SELECT
    courses.course_id,
    courses.title,
    COALESCE(
        jsonb_agg(
            jsonb_build_object(
                'sectionId',
                section_agg.course_section_id,
                'title',
                section_agg.title,
                'index',
                section_agg.index,
                'topics',
                section_agg.topics
            )
            ORDER BY
                section_agg.index
        ) FILTER (
            WHERE
                section_agg.course_section_id IS NOT NULL
        ),
        '[]' :: jsonb
    ) :: jsonb AS sections
FROM
    courses
    LEFT JOIN section_agg ON courses.course_id = section_agg.course_id
WHERE
    courses.course_id = @CourseID
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id;

package db

import (
	"context"

	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgtype"
)

const getCourseAuthorityById = `-- name: GetCourseAuthorityById :one
SELECT
    publish_status,
    author_id
FROM
    courses
WHERE
    courses.course_id = $1
`

type GetCourseAuthorityByIdRow struct {
	PublishStatus string      `json:"publish_status"`
	AuthorID      pgtype.UUID `json:"author_id"`
}

func (q *Queries) GetCourseAuthorityById(ctx context.Context, courseid pgtype.UUID) (GetCourseAuthorityByIdRow, error) {
	row := q.db.QueryRow(ctx, getCourseAuthorityById, courseid)
	var i GetCourseAuthorityByIdRow
	err := row.Scan(&i.PublishStatus, &i.AuthorID)
	return i, err
}

const getCourseStructureWithProgress = `-- name: GetCourseStructureWithProgress :one
WITH section_agg AS (
    SELECT
        sections.course_id,
        sections.course_section_id,
        sections.title,
        sections.index,
        COALESCE(
            jsonb_agg(
                jsonb_build_object(
                    'topicId',
                    topics.course_section_topic_id,
                    'title',
                    topics.title,
                    'status',
                    COALESCE(progresses.status, 'NOT_STARTED'),
                    'index',
                    topics.index
                )
                ORDER BY
                    topics.index
            ) FILTER (
                WHERE
                    topics.course_section_topic_id IS NOT NULL
            ),
            '[]' :: jsonb
        ) AS topics
    FROM
        course_sections AS sections
        LEFT JOIN course_section_topics AS topics ON sections.course_section_id = topics.course_section_id
        LEFT JOIN user_topic_progresses AS progresses ON progresses.course_section_topic_id = topics.course_section_topic_id
        AND progresses.user_id = $2
    WHERE
        sections.course_id = $1
    GROUP BY
        sections.course_id,
        sections.course_section_id,
        sections.index,
        sections.title
)
SELECT
    courses.course_id,
    courses.title,
    COALESCE(
        jsonb_agg(
            jsonb_build_object(
                'sectionId',
                section_agg.course_section_id,
                'title',
                section_agg.title,
                'index',
                section_agg.index,
                'topics',
                section_agg.topics
            )
            ORDER BY
                section_agg.index
        ) FILTER (
            WHERE
                section_agg.course_section_id IS NOT NULL
        ),
        '[]' :: jsonb
    ) :: jsonb AS sections
FROM
    courses
    LEFT JOIN section_agg ON courses.course_id = section_agg.course_id
WHERE
    courses.course_id = $1
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id
`

type GetCourseStructureWithProgressParams struct {
	Courseid pgtype.UUID `json:"courseid"`
	Userid   pgtype.UUID `json:"userid"`
}

type GetCourseStructureWithProgressRow struct {
	CourseID pgtype.UUID `json:"course_id"`
	Title    string      `json:"title"`
	Sections []byte      `json:"sections"`
}

func (q *Queries) GetCourseStructureWithProgress(ctx context.Context, arg GetCourseStructureWithProgressParams) (GetCourseStructureWithProgressRow, error) {
	row := q.db.QueryRow(ctx, getCourseStructureWithProgress, arg.Courseid, arg.Userid)
	var i GetCourseStructureWithProgressRow
	err := row.Scan(&i.CourseID, &i.Title, &i.Sections)
	return i, err
}

const getEnrollmentsByUserID = `-- name: GetEnrollmentsByUserID :many
SELECT
    courses.course_id AS "courseId",
    courses.title
FROM
    user_topic_progresses
    JOIN course_section_topics ON user_topic_progresses.course_section_topic_id = course_section_topics.course_section_topic_id
    JOIN course_sections ON course_section_topics.course_section_id = course_sections.course_section_id
    JOIN courses ON course_sections.course_id = courses.course_id
WHERE
    user_topic_progresses.user_id = $1 :: uuid
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id,
    courses.title
ORDER BY
    MAX(user_topic_progresses._updated_at) DESC
`

type GetEnrollmentsByUserIDRow struct {
	CourseId pgtype.UUID `json:"courseId"`
	Title    string      `json:"title"`
}

func (q *Queries) GetEnrollmentsByUserID(ctx context.Context, userid pgtype.UUID) ([]GetEnrollmentsByUserIDRow, error) {
	rows, err := q.db.Query(ctx, getEnrollmentsByUserID, userid)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	items := []GetEnrollmentsByUserIDRow{}
	for rows.Next() {
		var i GetEnrollmentsByUserIDRow
		if err := rows.Scan(&i.CourseId, &i.Title); err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		items = append(items, i)
	}
	if err := rows.Err(); err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return items, nil
}

# MIGRATION UP

## テーブル

- \_created_at カラムと \_updated_at カラムを用意
  - 初期値は now()
- update 時に update_meta_updated_at() を呼び出すトリガーを設定
- CHECK 制約と文字数上限の制限は行わない
  - アプリケーション側で担保
- 初期値は不要
  - 常にアプリケーション側で生成
  - カラム追加時に既存のデータのマイグレーションが必要な場合のみ一時的な初期値を用意
  - マイグレーション完了後初期値は削除する
  - \_created_at と \_updated_at はアプリケーションから参照しないメタカラムのため例外
- 制約の名前を明示

## FUNCTION

- CREATE 時の OR REPLACE は不要

## EXTENSION

- CREATE 時の IF NOT EXISTS は不要

## INDEX

- CREATE INDEX は USING で種類を明示

## テーブル

- \_created_at カラムと \_updated_at カラムを用意
  - 初期値は now()
- update 時に update_meta_updated_at() を呼び出すトリガーを設定
- CHECK 制約と文字数上限の制限は行わない
  - アプリケーション側で担保
- 初期値は不要
  - 常にアプリケーション側で生成
  - カラム追加時に既存のデータのマイグレーションが必要な場合のみ一時的な初期値を用意
  - マイグレーション完了後初期値は削除する
  - \_created_at と \_updated_at はアプリケーションから参照しないメタカラムのため例外
- 制約の名前を明示

## FUNCTION

- CREATE 時の OR REPLACE は不要

## EXTENSION

- CREATE 時の IF NOT EXISTS は不要

## INDEX

- CREATE INDEX は USING で種類を明示

149		var records []updProgressRecord
150		for rows.Next() {
151			var r updProgressRecord
152			if err := rows.Scan(&r.topicID, &r.status); err != nil {
153				t.Fatalf("progressのスキャンに失敗しました: %v", err)
154			}
155			records = append(records, r)
156		}
157		return records
158	}
159	
160	func insertUpdateProgress(ctx context.Context, pool *pgxpool.Pool, userID, topicID, status string) error {
161		_, err := pool.Exec(ctx,
162			`INSERT INTO user_topic_progresses (course_section_topic_id, user_id, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)`,
163			topicID, userID, status,
164		)
165		return err
166	}
167	
168	func TestPatchEnrollmentHandlerMedium(t *testing.T) {
169		ctx := context.Background()
170		pool, err := pgxpool.New(ctx, env.Require("DATABASE_URL"))
171		if err != nil {
172			t.Fatalf("DBへの接続に失敗しました: %v", err)
173		}
174		defer pool.Close()
175	
176		if err := setupUpdateEnrollmentTestData(ctx, pool); err != nil {
177			t.Fatalf("テストデータのセットアップに失敗しました: %v", err)
178		}
179		t.Cleanup(func() { cleanupUpdateEnrollmentTestData(ctx, pool) })
180	
181		q := db.New(pool)
182		handler := NewUpdateEnrollmentHandler(NewUpdateEnrollmentUsecase(NewSqrcCourseRepository(q), NewSqrcUserTopicProgressRepository(q)))
183	
184		newReq := func(t *testing.T, userID, courseID, body string) *http.Request {
185			t.Helper()
186			req := httptest.NewRequest("PATCH", "/v1/users/"+userID+"/enrollments/"+courseID, strings.NewReader(body))
187			req.SetPathValue("userID", userID)
188			req.SetPathValue("courseId", courseID)
189			return req
190		}
191	
192		t.Run("未受講のtopicをIN_PROGRESSで開始できる", func(t *testing.T) {
193			t.Cleanup(func() { cleanupUpdateProgresses(ctx, pool) })
194	
195			w := httptest.NewRecorder()
196			handler.PatchEnrollmentHandler(w, newReq(t, updTestUserID, updTestCourseID, `{"topicId":"`+updTestTopic00ID+`","status":"IN_PROGRESS"}`))
197	
198			if w.Result().StatusCode != http.StatusOK {
199				t.Fatalf("ステータスコードが200であること: got %d", w.Result().StatusCode)
200			}
201			var body map[string]string
202			json.NewDecoder(w.Result().Body).Decode(&body)
203			if body["topicId"] != updTestTopic00ID || body["status"] != "IN_PROGRESS" {
204				t.Errorf("レスポンス不一致: got %+v", body)
205			}
206	
207			progresses := getUpdateProgresses(t, ctx, pool, updTestUserID)
208			if len(progresses) != 1 {
209				t.Fatalf("progressが1件であること: got %d", len(progresses))
210			}
211			if progresses[0].topicID != updTestTopic00ID || progresses[0].status != "IN_PROGRESS" {
212				t.Errorf("progress不一致: got %+v", progresses[0])
213			}
214		})
215	
216		t.Run("未受講のtopicをCOMPLETEDで保存できる", func(t *testing.T) {
217			t.Cleanup(func() { cleanupUpdateProgresses(ctx, pool) })
218	
219			w := httptest.NewRecorder()
220			handler.PatchEnrollmentHandler(w, newReq(t, updTestUserID, updTestCourseID, `{"topicId":"`+updTestTopic00ID+`","status":"COMPLETED"}`))
221	
222			if w.Result().StatusCode != http.StatusOK {
223				t.Fatalf("ステータスコードが200であること: got %d", w.Result().StatusCode)
224			}
225	
226			progresses := getUpdateProgresses(t, ctx, pool, updTestUserID)
227			if len(progresses) != 1 {
228				t.Fatalf("progressが1件であること: got %d", len(progresses))
229			}
230			if progresses[0].status != "COMPLETED" {
231				t.Errorf("statusがCOMPLETEDであること: got %q", progresses[0].status)
232			}
233		})
234	
235		t.Run("既存IN_PROGRESSをCOMPLETEDに遷移できる", func(t *testing.T) {
236			t.Cleanup(func() { cleanupUpdateProgresses(ctx, pool) })
237			if err := insertUpdateProgress(ctx, pool, updTestUserID, updTestTopic00ID, "IN_PROGRESS"); err != nil {
238				t.Fatalf("テストデータの挿入に失敗しました: %v", err)
239			}
240	
241			w := httptest.NewRecorder()
242			handler.PatchEnrollmentHandler(w, newReq(t, updTestUserID, updTestCourseID, `{"topicId":"`+updTestTopic00ID+`","status":"COMPLETED"}`))
243	
244			if w.Result().StatusCode != http.StatusOK {
245				t.Fatalf("ステータスコードが200であること: got %d", w.Result().StatusCode)
246			}
247	
248			progresses := getUpdateProgresses(t, ctx, pool, updTestUserID)
249			if len(progresses) != 1 || progresses[0].status != "COMPLETED" {
250				t.Errorf("progressがCOMPLETEDに更新されていること: got %+v", progresses)
251			}
252		})
253	
254		t.Run("topicIdが別コースの場合404 TOPIC_NOT_FOUNDを返しDBは変化しない", func(t *testing.T) {
255			t.Cleanup(func() { cleanupUpdateProgresses(ctx, pool) })
256	
257			w := httptest.NewRecorder()
258			handler.PatchEnrollmentHandler(w, newReq(t, updTestUserID, updTestCourseID, `{"topicId":"`+updTestOtherTopic+`","status":"IN_PROGRESS"}`))
259	
260			if w.Result().StatusCode != http.StatusNotFound {
261				t.Errorf("ステータスコードが404であること: got %d", w.Result().StatusCode)
262			}
263			var body map[string]string

265			if body["errorCode"] != "TOPIC_NOT_FOUND" {
266				t.Errorf("errorCodeが一致すること: got %q", body["errorCode"])
267			}
268	
269			progresses := getUpdateProgresses(t, ctx, pool, updTestUserID)
270			if len(progresses) != 0 {
271				t.Errorf("DBに変更がないこと: got %d 件", len(progresses))
272			}
273		})
274	
275		t.Run("draftコースに非著者がアクセスすると403を返す", func(t *testing.T) {

package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/env"
	libauth "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/auth"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/txrunner"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/courses/queries"
	enrollmentscommands "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/enrollments/commands"
	enrollmentsqueries "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/enrollments/queries"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/settings/apikeys"
	userscommands "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/commands"
	usersqueries "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/queries"
	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
)

func main() {
	ctx := context.Background()
	pool, err := pgxpool.New(ctx, env.Require("DATABASE_URL"))
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer pool.Close()

	q := db.New(pool)

	coursesHandler := queries.NewCoursesHandlers(q)
	updateEnrollmentHandler := enrollmentscommands.NewUpdateEnrollmentHandler(enrollmentscommands.NewUpdateEnrollmentUsecase(enrollmentscommands.NewSqrcCourseRepository(q), enrollmentscommands.NewSqrcUserTopicProgressRepository(q)))
	topicDetailHandler := queries.NewTopicDetailHandler(q)
	verifier := libauth.NewVerifier(env.Require("SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET"), env.Require("SUPABASE_URL"))
	apikeysHandler := apikeys.NewGenerateApiKeyHandler(apikeys.NewGenerateApiKeyUsecase(apikeys.NewApiKeySqrcRepository(), txrunner.NewPgxTransactionRunner(pool)), verifier)
	listApiKeysHandler := apikeys.NewListApiKeysHandler(q, verifier)

	getUserHandler := usersqueries.NewGetUserHandler(q)
	updateUserHandler := userscommands.NewUpdateUserHandler(
		userscommands.NewUpdateUserUsecase(userscommands.NewUserSqrcRepository(q)),
		verifier,
	)
	getEnrollmentsHandler := enrollmentsqueries.NewGetEnrollmentsHandler(q)
	getEnrollmentHandler := enrollmentsqueries.NewGetEnrollmentHandler(q)

	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses", coursesHandler.GetCoursesHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/topics/{topicId}", topicDetailHandler.GetTopicDetailHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/users/{userID}/apikeys", apikeysHandler.GenerateApiKeyHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/users/{userID}/settings/apikeys", listApiKeysHandler.ListApiKeysHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/users/{userID}", getUserHandler.GetUserHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("PATCH /v1/users/{userID}", updateUserHandler.PatchUserHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/users/{userID}/enrollments", getEnrollmentsHandler.GetEnrollmentsHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/users/{userID}/enrollments/{courseId}", getEnrollmentHandler.GetEnrollmentHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("PATCH /v1/users/{userID}/enrollments/{courseId}", updateEnrollmentHandler.PatchEnrollmentHandler)

	log.Println("Server starting on :8080")
	log.Fatal(http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil))
}

1	CREATE EXTENSION ltree;
2	
3	CREATE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at()
4	RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
5	BEGIN
6	  NEW._updated_at := NOW();
7	  RETURN NEW;
8	END;
9	$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
10	
11	CREATE TABLE categories (
12	    category_id UUID,
13	    name TEXT NOT NULL,
14	    path ltree NOT NULL,
15	
16	    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
17	    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
18	
19	    CONSTRAINT pk_categories PRIMARY KEY (category_id)
20	);
21	
22	CREATE INDEX idx_categories_path ON categories USING gist (path);
23	
24	CREATE TABLE authors (
25	    author_id UUID,
26	    name TEXT NOT NULL,
27	    profile TEXT NOT NULL,
28	
29	    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
30	    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
31	
32	    CONSTRAINT pk_authors PRIMARY KEY (author_id)
33	);
34	
35	CREATE TABLE courses (
36	    course_id UUID,
37	    title TEXT NOT NULL,
38	    description TEXT NOT NULL,
39	    slug TEXT NOT NULL,
40	    tags JSONB NOT NULL,
41	    publish_status TEXT NOT NULL,
42	    category_id UUID NOT NULL,
43	    published_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
44	    author_id UUID NOT NULL,
45	    visibility TEXT NOT NULL,
46	
47	    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
48	    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
49	
50	    CONSTRAINT pk_courses PRIMARY KEY (course_id),
51	    CONSTRAINT fk_courses_category_id FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES categories(category_id),
52	    CONSTRAINT fk_courses_author_id FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES authors(author_id),
53	    CONSTRAINT uq_courses_slug_author_id UNIQUE (slug, author_id)
54	);
55	
56	CREATE INDEX idx_courses_category_id ON courses USING btree (category_id);
57	CREATE INDEX idx_courses_author_id ON courses USING btree (author_id);
58	CREATE INDEX idx_courses_tags ON courses USING gin (tags);
59	
60	COMMENT ON COLUMN courses.publish_status IS 'draft / published / archived';
61	COMMENT ON COLUMN courses.visibility IS 'private = 自分のみ, public = 誰でも閲覧可, paid = 購入者のみ';
62	
63	CREATE TRIGGER trigger_courses_meta_updated_at
64	    BEFORE UPDATE ON courses
65	    FOR EACH ROW
66	    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();
67	
68	CREATE TRIGGER trigger_categories_meta_updated_at
69	    BEFORE UPDATE ON categories
70	    FOR EACH ROW
71	    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();
72	
73	CREATE TRIGGER trigger_authors_meta_updated_at
74	    BEFORE UPDATE ON authors
75	    FOR EACH ROW
76	    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

.PHONY: dev migrate-up test-all test-coverage test-coverage-show

DATABASE_URL ?= postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres?sslmode=disable

SUPABASE_URL ?= http://127.0.0.1:54321
SUPABASE_ANON_KEY ?= REDACTED
SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET ?= super-secret-jwt-token-with-at-least-32-characters-long
WEB_ORIGIN ?= http://localhost:60000
COOKIE_SECURE ?= false

export DATABASE_URL
export SUPABASE_URL
export SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
export SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET
export WEB_ORIGIN
export COOKIE_SECURE

help:
	@echo "make dev: 開発サーバー起動（ホットリロード付き）"
	@echo "make migrate-up: マイグレーション実行"
	@echo "make test-all: 全テスト実行（カバレッジ付き）"
	@echo "make test-coverage: カバレッジが80%以上かチェック"
	@echo "make test-coverage-show: カバレッジをブラウザで表示"

dev:
	mkdir -p ./tmp && GOTMPDIR=$(CURDIR)/tmp GOCACHE=$(CURDIR)/tmp/go-cache go tool air

migrate-up:
	migrate -path ./migrations -database "$(DATABASE_URL)" up

db-reset:
	pnpm dlx supabase --workdir ../../packages/supabase db reset
	$(MAKE) migrate-up

query-generate:
	sqlc generate

test-all:
	go test -coverpkg=./... -coverprofile=coverage.out ./...

test-coverage-show: test-all
	go tool cover -html=coverage.out

test-coverage:
	@go test -coverpkg=./... -coverprofile=coverage.out ./... > /dev/null 2>&1 || (echo "NG: テスト失敗"; exit 1)
	@go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1 | awk '{gsub(/%/,"",$$3); if ($$3+0 < 80) {print "NG: " $$3 "% < 80%"; exit 1} else {print "OK: " $$3 "%"}}'
---
coverage.out
go.mod
go.sum
internal
lib
main.go
Makefile
migrations
queries
README.md
routes
sqlc.yaml
tmp

-- name: GetCourses :many
SELECT
    course_id AS "courseId",
    title
FROM
    courses
WHERE
    (
        courses.publish_status = 'published'
        AND courses.visibility IN ('public', 'paid')
    )
    AND (
        @Cursor :: uuid IS NULL
        OR course_id > @Cursor
    )
    AND (
        NULLIF(@Keyword :: text, '') IS NULL
        OR title LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%'
        OR description LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%'
    )
ORDER BY
    course_id
LIMIT
    @Size;

-- name: GetCourseById :one
SELECT
    courses.course_id,
    courses.title,
    courses.description,
    courses.slug,
    courses.tags,
    courses.publish_status,
    courses.category_id,
    categories.name AS category_name,
    courses.published_at,
    courses.author_id,
    authors.name AS author_name,
    courses.visibility,
    json_agg(
        json_build_object(
            'course_section_id',
            sections.course_section_id,
            'title',
            sections.title,
            'description',
            sections.description,
            'topics',
            sections.topics
        )
        ORDER BY
            sections."index" ASC
    ) AS sections
FROM
    courses
    JOIN categories USING (category_id)
    JOIN authors USING (author_id)
    JOIN (
        SELECT
            course_sections.course_id,
            course_sections.course_section_id,
            course_sections.title,
            course_sections.description,
            course_sections."index",
            json_agg(
                json_build_object(
                    'course_section_topic_id',
                    course_section_topic_id,
                    'title',
                    course_section_topics.title,
                    'description',
                    course_section_topics.description,
                    'prerequisites',
                    course_section_topics.prerequisites,
                    'knowledge',
                    course_section_topics.knowledge,
                    'flow',
                    course_section_topics.flow,
                    'quiz',
                    course_section_topics.quiz,
                    'completion_criteria',
                    course_section_topics.completion_criteria
                )
                ORDER BY
                    course_section_topics."index" ASC
            ) AS topics
        FROM
            course_sections
            JOIN course_section_topics USING (course_section_id)
        GROUP BY
            course_sections.course_id,
            course_sections.course_section_id
    ) AS sections USING (course_id)
WHERE
    courses.course_id = @CourseId :: uuid
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id,
    courses.title,
    courses.description,
    courses.slug,
    courses.tags,
    courses.publish_status,
    courses.category_id,
    categories.name,
    courses.published_at,
    courses.author_id,
    authors.name,
    courses.visibility;

-- name: GetProgressByUserIdAndCourseId :many
SELECT
    utp.course_section_topic_id,
    utp.user_id,
    utp.status,
    cs."index" AS section_index,
    cst."index" AS topic_index
FROM
    user_topic_progresses utp
    JOIN course_section_topics cst ON utp.course_section_topic_id = cst.course_section_topic_id
    JOIN course_sections cs ON cst.course_section_id = cs.course_section_id
WHERE
    utp.user_id = @UserId :: uuid
    AND cst.course_id = @CourseId :: uuid;

-- name: UpsertProgress :exec
INSERT INTO
    user_topic_progresses (
        course_section_topic_id,
        user_id,
        status
    )
VALUES
    (
        @CourseSectionTopicId :: uuid,
        @UserId :: uuid,
        @Status
    ) ON CONFLICT (course_section_topic_id, user_id) DO
UPDATE
SET
    status = EXCLUDED.status;

-- name: GetTopicDetail :one
SELECT
    courses.course_id AS "courseId",
    course_sections.course_section_id AS "sectionId",
    course_section_topics.course_section_topic_id as "topicId",
    course_section_topics.title,
    course_section_topics.description,
    course_section_topics.prerequisites,
    course_section_topics.knowledge,
    course_section_topics.flow,
    course_section_topics.quiz,
    course_section_topics.completion_criteria AS "completionCriteria"
FROM
    course_section_topics
    JOIN course_sections USING (course_section_id)
    JOIN courses ON courses.course_id = course_sections.course_id
WHERE
    course_section_topic_id = @topic_id :: uuid
    AND course_sections.course_section_id = @section_id :: uuid
    AND course_sections.course_id = @course_id :: uuid
    AND (
        courses.publish_status = 'published'
        OR (
            @user_id :: uuid IS NOT NULL
            AND courses.author_id = @user_id :: uuid
        )
    );

//   sqlc v1.30.0

package db

import (
	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgtype"
)

type Apikey struct {
	KeyHash     string             `json:"key_hash"`
	UserID      pgtype.UUID        `json:"user_id"`
	PlainSuffix string             `json:"plain_suffix"`
	ExpiredAt   pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"expired_at"`
	CreatedAt   pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_created_at"`
	UpdatedAt   pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_updated_at"`
	ApikeyID    pgtype.UUID        `json:"apikey_id"`
}

type Author struct {
	AuthorID  pgtype.UUID        `json:"author_id"`
	Name      string             `json:"name"`
	Profile   string             `json:"profile"`
	CreatedAt pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_created_at"`
	UpdatedAt pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_updated_at"`
}

type Category struct {
	CategoryID pgtype.UUID        `json:"category_id"`
	Name       string             `json:"name"`
	Path       string             `json:"path"`
	CreatedAt  pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_created_at"`
	UpdatedAt  pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_updated_at"`
}

type Course struct {
	CourseID    pgtype.UUID `json:"course_id"`
	Title       string      `json:"title"`
	Description string      `json:"description"`
	Slug        string      `json:"slug"`
	Tags        []byte      `json:"tags"`
	// draft / published / archived
	PublishStatus string             `json:"publish_status"`
	CategoryID    pgtype.UUID        `json:"category_id"`
	PublishedAt   pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"published_at"`
	AuthorID      pgtype.UUID        `json:"author_id"`
	// private = 自分のみ, public = 誰でも閲覧可, paid = 購入者のみ
	Visibility string             `json:"visibility"`
	CreatedAt  pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_created_at"`
	UpdatedAt  pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_updated_at"`
}

type CourseSection struct {
	CourseSectionID pgtype.UUID        `json:"course_section_id"`
	CourseID        pgtype.UUID        `json:"course_id"`
	Index           int16              `json:"index"`
	CreatedAt       pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_created_at"`
	UpdatedAt       pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_updated_at"`
	Title           string             `json:"title"`
	Description     string             `json:"description"`
}

type CourseSectionTopic struct {
	CourseSectionTopicID pgtype.UUID        `json:"course_section_topic_id"`
	CourseID             pgtype.UUID        `json:"course_id"`
	CourseSectionID      pgtype.UUID        `json:"course_section_id"`
	Index                int16              `json:"index"`
	CreatedAt            pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_created_at"`
	UpdatedAt            pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_updated_at"`
	Title                string             `json:"title"`
	Description          string             `json:"description"`
	Prerequisites        string             `json:"prerequisites"`
	Knowledge            string             `json:"knowledge"`
	Flow                 string             `json:"flow"`
	Quiz                 string             `json:"quiz"`
	CompletionCriteria   string             `json:"completion_criteria"`
}

type User struct {
	UserID    pgtype.UUID        `json:"user_id"`
	Nickname  string             `json:"nickname"`
	CreatedAt pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_created_at"`
	UpdatedAt pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_updated_at"`
	Introduce string             `json:"introduce"`
}

type UserTopicProgress struct {
	CourseSectionTopicID pgtype.UUID `json:"course_section_topic_id"`
	UserID               pgtype.UUID `json:"user_id"`
	// IN_PROGRESS = 開始済み, COMPLETED = 完了済み, 開始していない場合はレコード自体がないので値として持たない
	Status    string             `json:"status"`
	CreatedAt pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_created_at"`
	UpdatedAt pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"_updated_at"`
}

content.text:
設計と既存 schema 把握できました。先に進める前に、1 点だけ確認させてください。

## 確認したい点 — 既存 `user_topic_progresses` への enrollment_id 紐付け

現在 `user_topic_progresses` テーブルは `(course_section_topic_id, user_id)` を PK にしており、`course_id` カラムは migration 003 で削除済みです。

Enrollment 集約を立てる場合、`user_topic_progresses` に `enrollment_id` (FK) を持たせるのが集約境界として自然ですが、これに伴い:

1. **マイグレーションの backfill が必要**:
   - 既存の (user_id, course_id) ペアごとに enrollments レコードを生成
   - user_topic_progresses.enrollment_id を埋める
   - course_id は course_section_topics と JOIN して取得

2. **`UpsertProgress` クエリの差し替え**:
   - 現在の `UpsertProgress (course_section_topic_id, user_id, status)` → `enrollment_id` も渡す形へ

3. **PATCH の挙動 (重要)**:
   - 「明示的な Enroll API が別 PR」と確認したので、PATCH 実行時に Enrollment が存在しなければ **lazy 作成** するしかない (現挙動を維持)
   - 完了後、別 PR で `POST /enrollments` を立てたタイミングで PATCH を「未受講なら 404 を返す」に切り替える

この方針で進めて良いですか？特に「**lazy enroll を当面は許容**する」点だけ合意したく。OK なら一気に migration / sqlc / ドメイン / usecase / テストまで進めます。

lastPrompt: この PR ないでやっちゃおう。受講用の API は別できるんだよね

content.text:
了解です。受講開始 API もこの PR に含めるんですね。Auto モードも抜けたので、進める前に少し設計を詰めさせてください。

## 確認したい点

### 1. 受講開始 API の仕様

| 項目 | 案 |
|---|---|
| エンドポイント | `POST /v1/users/{userID}/enrollments` |
| リクエストボディ | `{ "courseId": "<uuid>" }` |
| 成功レスポンス | `201 Created` + `{ "enrollmentId": "<uuid>", "courseId": "<uuid>", "enrolledAt": "<rfc3339>" }` |
| エラー | 公開コース or 自分のコースでない場合 → `403 ENROLLMENT_FORBIDDEN`、コース不存在 → `404 COURSE_NOT_FOUND`、既に受講中 → `409 ALREADY_ENROLLED`（または冪等で 200 にする?） |

「既に受講中」の扱いをどうするか：
- (a) `409 ALREADY_ENROLLED` を返す
- (b) 冪等にして既存 Enrollment を返す `200 OK`

どちらが好みですか？

### 2. PATCH 進捗更新の挙動

新仕様では「Enrollment が存在しないと進捗更新できない」になります。
- 未受講のコースに対して PATCH → `404 NOT_ENROLLED` (or `409`?)
- 既存テスト「未受講のtopicをIN_PROGRESSで開始できる」は事前に Enrollment を作ってから呼ぶ形に書き換え

これで OK ですか？

### 3. テーブル設計（クリーン版・データリセット前提）

```sql
CREATE TABLE enrollments (
    enrollment_id UUID,
    user_id UUID NOT NULL,
    course_id UUID NOT NULL,
    enrolled_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    CONSTRAINT pk_enrollments PRIMARY KEY (enrollment_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(course_id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_enrollments_user_id_course_id UNIQUE (user_id, course_id)
);

-- user_topic_progresses → topic_progresses にリネーム、user_id 削除
DROP TABLE user_topic_progresses;
CREATE TABLE topic_progresses (
    enrollment_id UUID NOT NULL,
    course_section_topic_id UUID NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL,
    _created_at ...,
    _updated_at ...,
    PRIMARY KEY (enrollment_id, course_section_topic_id),
    FK enrollment_id → enrollments,
    FK course_section_topic_id → course_section_topics
);
```

この前提で:
- `GetEnrollmentsByUserID` (既存・コース一覧用) → `enrollments` テーブル直参照に書き換え
- `GetCourseStructureWithProgress` → `enrollments` JOIN 経由に書き換え
- `GetProgressByUserIdAndCourseId` → 同上

ここまで全部 OK なら、migration / sqlc / ドメイン / Enroll API / PATCH 差し替え / テスト更新を一気に進めます。

特に **「既に受講中」を 409 にするか冪等にするか** だけ意思決定が要ります。どちらが良いですか？

input.content:
-- name: GetEnrollmentsByUserID :many
SELECT
    courses.course_id AS "courseId",
    courses.title
FROM
    enrollments
    JOIN courses ON enrollments.course_id = courses.course_id
WHERE
    enrollments.user_id = @UserID :: uuid
ORDER BY
    enrollments._updated_at DESC;

-- name: GetCourseAuthorityById :one
SELECT
    publish_status,
    author_id
FROM
    courses
WHERE
    courses.course_id = @CourseID;

-- name: GetCourseStructureWithProgress :one
WITH section_agg AS (
    SELECT
        sections.course_id,
        sections.course_section_id,
        sections.title,
        sections.index,
        COALESCE(
            jsonb_agg(
                jsonb_build_object(
                    'topicId',
                    topics.course_section_topic_id,
                    'title',
                    topics.title,
                    'status',
                    COALESCE(progresses.status, 'NOT_STARTED'),
                    'index',
                    topics.index
                )
                ORDER BY
                    topics.index
            ) FILTER (
                WHERE
                    topics.course_section_topic_id IS NOT NULL
            ),
            '[]' :: jsonb
        ) AS topics
    FROM
        course_sections AS sections
        LEFT JOIN course_section_topics AS topics ON sections.course_section_id = topics.course_section_id
        LEFT JOIN enrollments ON enrollments.course_id = sections.course_id
        AND enrollments.user_id = @UserID
        LEFT JOIN topic_progresses AS progresses ON progresses.enrollment_id = enrollments.enrollment_id
        AND progresses.course_section_topic_id = topics.course_section_topic_id
    WHERE
        sections.course_id = @CourseID
    GROUP BY
        sections.course_id,
        sections.course_section_id,
        sections.index,
        sections.title
)
SELECT
    courses.course_id,
    courses.title,
    COALESCE(
        jsonb_agg(
            jsonb_build_object(
                'sectionId',
                section_agg.course_section_id,
                'title',
                section_agg.title,
                'index',
                section_agg.index,
                'topics',
                section_agg.topics
            )
            ORDER BY
                section_agg.index
        ) FILTER (
            WHERE
                section_agg.course_section_id IS NOT NULL
        ),
        '[]' :: jsonb
    ) :: jsonb AS sections
FROM
    courses
    LEFT JOIN section_agg ON courses.course_id = section_agg.course_id
WHERE
    courses.course_id = @CourseID
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id;

-- name: GetEnrollmentByUserIdAndCourseId :one
SELECT
    enrollment_id,
    user_id,
    course_id,
    enrolled_at
FROM
    enrollments
WHERE
    user_id = @UserID :: uuid
    AND course_id = @CourseID :: uuid;

-- name: GetTopicProgressesByEnrollmentId :many
SELECT
    course_section_topic_id,
    status
FROM
    topic_progresses
WHERE
    enrollment_id = @EnrollmentID :: uuid;

-- name: InsertEnrollment :exec
INSERT INTO
    enrollments (
        enrollment_id,
        user_id,
        course_id,
        enrolled_at
    )
VALUES
    (
        @EnrollmentID :: uuid,
        @UserID :: uuid,
        @CourseID :: uuid,
        @EnrolledAt
    );

-- name: UpsertTopicProgress :exec
INSERT INTO
    topic_progresses (
        enrollment_id,
        course_section_topic_id,
        status
    )
VALUES
    (
        @EnrollmentID :: uuid,
        @CourseSectionTopicID :: uuid,
        @Status
    ) ON CONFLICT (enrollment_id, course_section_topic_id) DO
UPDATE
SET
    status = EXCLUDED.status;

    courses.title
FROM

        LEFT JOIN course_section_topics AS topics ON sections.course_section_id = topics.course_section_id
        LEFT JOIN user_topic_progresses AS progresses ON progresses.course_section_topic_id = topics.course_section_topic_id
        AND progresses.user_id = @UserID

toolUseResult.originalFile:
-- name: GetCourses :many
SELECT
    course_id AS "courseId",
    title
FROM
    courses
WHERE
    (
        courses.publish_status = 'published'
        AND courses.visibility IN ('public', 'paid')
    )
    AND (
        @Cursor :: uuid IS NULL
        OR course_id > @Cursor
    )
    AND (
        NULLIF(@Keyword :: text, '') IS NULL
        OR title LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%'
        OR description LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%'
    )
ORDER BY
    course_id
LIMIT
    @Size;

-- name: GetCourseById :one
SELECT
    courses.course_id,
    courses.title,
    courses.description,
    courses.slug,
    courses.tags,
    courses.publish_status,
    courses.category_id,
    categories.name AS category_name,
    courses.published_at,
    courses.author_id,
    authors.name AS author_name,
    courses.visibility,
    json_agg(
        json_build_object(
            'course_section_id',
            sections.course_section_id,
            'title',
            sections.title,
            'description',
            sections.description,
            'topics',
            sections.topics
        )
        ORDER BY
            sections."index" ASC
    ) AS sections
FROM
    courses
    JOIN categories USING (category_id)
    JOIN authors USING (author_id)
    JOIN (
        SELECT
            course_sections.course_id,
            course_sections.course_section_id,
            course_sections.title,
            course_sections.description,
            course_sections."index",
            json_agg(
                json_build_object(
                    'course_section_topic_id',
                    course_section_topic_id,
                    'title',
                    course_section_topics.title,
                    'description',
                    course_section_topics.description,
                    'prerequisites',
                    course_section_topics.prerequisites,
                    'knowledge',
                    course_section_topics.knowledge,
                    'flow',
                    course_section_topics.flow,
                    'quiz',
                    course_section_topics.quiz,
                    'completion_criteria',
                    course_section_topics.completion_criteria
                )
                ORDER BY
                    course_section_topics."index" ASC
            ) AS topics
        FROM
            course_sections
            JOIN course_section_topics USING (course_section_id)
        GROUP BY
            course_sections.course_id,
            course_sections.course_section_id
    ) AS sections USING (course_id)
WHERE
    courses.course_id = @CourseId :: uuid
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id,
    courses.title,
    courses.description,
    courses.slug,
    courses.tags,
    courses.publish_status,
    courses.category_id,
    categories.name,
    courses.published_at,
    courses.author_id,
    authors.name,
    courses.visibility;

-- name: GetTopicDetail :one
SELECT
    courses.course_id AS "courseId",
    course_sections.course_section_id AS "sectionId",
    course_section_topics.course_section_topic_id as "topicId",
    course_section_topics.title,
    course_section_topics.description,
    course_section_topics.prerequisites,
    course_section_topics.knowledge,
    course_section_topics.flow,
    course_section_topics.quiz,
    course_section_topics.completion_criteria AS "completionCriteria"
FROM
    course_section_topics
    JOIN course_sections USING (course_section_id)
    JOIN courses ON courses.course_id = course_sections.course_id
WHERE
    course_section_topic_id = @topic_id :: uuid
    AND course_sections.course_section_id = @section_id :: uuid
    AND course_sections.course_id = @course_id :: uuid
    AND (
        courses.publish_status = 'published'
        OR (
            @user_id :: uuid IS NOT NULL
            AND courses.author_id = @user_id :: uuid
        )
    );

	CourseSectionTopicID pgtype.UUID `json:"course_section_topic_id"`
	Status               string      `json:"status"`
}

func (q *Queries) GetTopicProgressesByEnrollmentId(ctx context.Context, enrollmentid pgtype.UUID) ([]GetTopicProgressesByEnrollmentIdRow, error) {
	rows, err := q.db.Query(ctx, getTopicProgressesByEnrollmentId, enrollmentid)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	items := []GetTopicProgressesByEnrollmentIdRow{}
	for rows.Next() {
		var i GetTopicProgressesByEnrollmentIdRow
		if err := rows.Scan(&i.CourseSectionTopicID, &i.Status); err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		items = append(items, i)
	}
	if err := rows.Err(); err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return items, nil
}

const insertEnrollment = `-- name: InsertEnrollment :exec
INSERT INTO
    enrollments (
        enrollment_id,
        user_id,
        course_id,
        enrolled_at
    )
VALUES
    (
        $1 :: uuid,
        $2 :: uuid,
        $3 :: uuid,
        $4
    )
`

type InsertEnrollmentParams struct {
	Enrollmentid pgtype.UUID        `json:"enrollmentid"`
	Userid       pgtype.UUID        `json:"userid"`
	Courseid     pgtype.UUID        `json:"courseid"`
	Enrolledat   pgtype.Timestamptz `json:"enrolledat"`
}

func (q *Queries) InsertEnrollment(ctx context.Context, arg InsertEnrollmentParams) error {
	_, err := q.db.Exec(ctx, insertEnrollment,
		arg.Enrollmentid,
		arg.Userid,
		arg.Courseid,
		arg.Enrolledat,
	)
	return err
}

const upsertTopicProgress = `-- name: UpsertTopicProgress :exec
INSERT INTO
    topic_progresses (
        enrollment_id,
        course_section_topic_id,
        status
    )
VALUES
    (
        $1 :: uuid,
        $2 :: uuid,
        $3
    ) ON CONFLICT (enrollment_id, course_section_topic_id) DO
UPDATE
SET
    status = EXCLUDED.status
`

type UpsertTopicProgressParams struct {
	Enrollmentid         pgtype.UUID `json:"enrollmentid"`
	Coursesectiontopicid pgtype.UUID `json:"coursesectiontopicid"`
	Status               string      `json:"status"`
}

func (q *Queries) UpsertTopicProgress(ctx context.Context, arg UpsertTopicProgressParams) error {
	_, err := q.db.Exec(ctx, upsertTopicProgress, arg.Enrollmentid, arg.Coursesectiontopicid, arg.Status)
	return err
}

package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"

func main() {
	ctx := context.Background()
	pool, err := pgxpool.New(ctx, env.Require("DATABASE_URL"))
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer pool.Close()

	q := db.New(pool)

	coursesHandler := queries.NewCoursesHandlers(q)
	updateEnrollmentHandler := enrollmentscommands.NewUpdateEnrollmentHandler(enrollmentscommands.NewUpdateEnrollmentUsecase(enrollmentscommands.NewSqrcCourseRepository(q), enrollmentscommands.NewSqrcUserTopicProgressRepository(q)))
	topicDetailHandler := queries.NewTopicDetailHandler(q)
	verifier := libauth.NewVerifier(env.Require("SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET"), env.Require("SUPABASE_URL"))

	getUserHandler := usersqueries.NewGetUserHandler(q)
	updateUserHandler := userscommands.NewUpdateUserHandler(
		userscommands.NewUpdateUserUsecase(userscommands.NewUserSqrcRepository(q)),
		verifier,
	)
	getEnrollmentsHandler := enrollmentsqueries.NewGetEnrollmentsHandler(q)
	getEnrollmentHandler := enrollmentsqueries.NewGetEnrollmentHandler(q)

	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses", coursesHandler.GetCoursesHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/topics/{topicId}", topicDetailHandler.GetTopicDetailHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/users/{userID}/apikeys", apikeysHandler.GenerateApiKeyHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/users/{userID}/settings/apikeys", listApiKeysHandler.ListApiKeysHandler)

	log.Println("Server starting on :8080")
	log.Fatal(http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil))
}

package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/env"
	libauth "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/auth"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/txrunner"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/courses/queries"
	enrollmentscommands "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/enrollments/commands"
	enrollmentsqueries "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/enrollments/queries"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/settings/apikeys"
	userscommands "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/commands"
	usersqueries "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/queries"
	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
)

func main() {
	ctx := context.Background()
	pool, err := pgxpool.New(ctx, env.Require("DATABASE_URL"))
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer pool.Close()

	q := db.New(pool)

	coursesHandler := queries.NewCoursesHandlers(q)
	courseRepo := enrollmentscommands.NewSqrcCourseRepository(q)
	enrollmentRepo := enrollmentscommands.NewSqrcEnrollmentRepository(q)
	updateEnrollmentHandler := enrollmentscommands.NewUpdateEnrollmentHandler(enrollmentscommands.NewUpdateEnrollmentUsecase(courseRepo, enrollmentRepo))
	enrollHandler := enrollmentscommands.NewEnrollHandler(enrollmentscommands.NewEnrollUsecase(courseRepo, enrollmentRepo))
	topicDetailHandler := queries.NewTopicDetailHandler(q)
	verifier := libauth.NewVerifier(env.Require("SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET"), env.Require("SUPABASE_URL"))
	apikeysHandler := apikeys.NewGenerateApiKeyHandler(apikeys.NewGenerateApiKeyUsecase(apikeys.NewApiKeySqrcRepository(), txrunner.NewPgxTransactionRunner(pool)), verifier)
	listApiKeysHandler := apikeys.NewListApiKeysHandler(q, verifier)

	getUserHandler := usersqueries.NewGetUserHandler(q)
	updateUserHandler := userscommands.NewUpdateUserHandler(
		userscommands.NewUpdateUserUsecase(userscommands.NewUserSqrcRepository(q)),
		verifier,
	)
	getEnrollmentsHandler := enrollmentsqueries.NewGetEnrollmentsHandler(q)
	getEnrollmentHandler := enrollmentsqueries.NewGetEnrollmentHandler(q)

	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses", coursesHandler.GetCoursesHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/topics/{topicId}", topicDetailHandler.GetTopicDetailHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/users/{userID}/apikeys", apikeysHandler.GenerateApiKeyHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/users/{userID}/settings/apikeys", listApiKeysHandler.ListApiKeysHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/users/{userID}", getUserHandler.GetUserHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("PATCH /v1/users/{userID}", updateUserHandler.PatchUserHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/users/{userID}/enrollments", getEnrollmentsHandler.GetEnrollmentsHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/users/{userID}/enrollments/{courseId}", getEnrollmentHandler.GetEnrollmentHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("PATCH /v1/users/{userID}/enrollments/{courseId}", updateEnrollmentHandler.PatchEnrollmentHandler)

	log.Println("Server starting on :8080")
	log.Fatal(http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil))
}

content.text:
3 件の修正が必要：
1. Enroll の test course に section/topic を追加（CourseById が INNER JOIN なので最低 1 件必要）
2. `GetEnrollmentsByUserID` の並び順を `MAX(topic_progresses._updated_at)` 基準にする（trigger が `enrollments._updated_at` を上書きするため）
3. trigger override で test data の updated_at が制御不能になる問題への対処

input.old_string:
-- name: GetEnrollmentsByUserID :many
SELECT
    courses.course_id AS "courseId",
    courses.title
FROM
    enrollments
    JOIN courses ON enrollments.course_id = courses.course_id
WHERE
    enrollments.user_id = @UserID :: uuid
ORDER BY
    enrollments._updated_at DESC;
input.new_string:
-- name: GetEnrollmentsByUserID :many
SELECT
    courses.course_id AS "courseId",
    courses.title
FROM
    enrollments
    JOIN courses ON enrollments.course_id = courses.course_id
    LEFT JOIN topic_progresses ON topic_progresses.enrollment_id = enrollments.enrollment_id
WHERE
    enrollments.user_id = @UserID :: uuid
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id,
    courses.title,
    enrollments.enrolled_at
ORDER BY
    COALESCE(MAX(topic_progresses._updated_at), enrollments.enrolled_at) DESC;

toolUseResult.originalFile:
-- name: GetEnrollmentsByUserID :many
SELECT
    courses.course_id AS "courseId",
    courses.title
FROM
    enrollments
    JOIN courses ON enrollments.course_id = courses.course_id

-- name: GetCourseAuthorityById :one
SELECT
    publish_status,
    author_id
FROM
    courses
WHERE
    courses.course_id = @CourseID;

-- name: GetCourseStructureWithProgress :one
WITH section_agg AS (
    SELECT
        sections.course_id,
        sections.course_section_id,
        sections.title,
        sections.index,
        COALESCE(
            jsonb_agg(
                jsonb_build_object(
                    'topicId',
                    topics.course_section_topic_id,
                    'title',
                    topics.title,
                    'status',
                    COALESCE(progresses.status, 'NOT_STARTED'),
                    'index',
                    topics.index
                )
                ORDER BY
                    topics.index
            ) FILTER (
                WHERE
                    topics.course_section_topic_id IS NOT NULL
            ),
            '[]' :: jsonb
        ) AS topics
    FROM
        course_sections AS sections
        LEFT JOIN course_section_topics AS topics ON sections.course_section_id = topics.course_section_id
        LEFT JOIN enrollments ON enrollments.course_id = sections.course_id
        AND enrollments.user_id = @UserID
        LEFT JOIN topic_progresses AS progresses ON progresses.enrollment_id = enrollments.enrollment_id
        AND progresses.course_section_topic_id = topics.course_section_topic_id
    WHERE
        sections.course_id = @CourseID
    GROUP BY
        sections.course_id,
        sections.course_section_id,
        sections.index,
        sections.title
)
SELECT
    courses.course_id,
    courses.title,
    COALESCE(
        jsonb_agg(
            jsonb_build_object(
                'sectionId',
                section_agg.course_section_id,
                'title',
                section_agg.title,
                'index',
                section_agg.index,
                'topics',
                section_agg.topics
            )
            ORDER BY
                section_agg.index
        ) FILTER (
            WHERE
                section_agg.course_section_id IS NOT NULL
        ),
        '[]' :: jsonb
    ) :: jsonb AS sections
FROM
    courses
    LEFT JOIN section_agg ON courses.course_id = section_agg.course_id
WHERE
    courses.course_id = @CourseID
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id;

-- name: GetEnrollmentByUserIdAndCourseId :one
SELECT
    enrollment_id,
    user_id,
    course_id,
    enrolled_at
FROM
    enrollments
WHERE
    user_id = @UserID :: uuid
    AND course_id = @CourseID :: uuid;

-- name: GetTopicProgressesByEnrollmentId :many
SELECT
    course_section_topic_id,
    status
FROM
    topic_progresses
WHERE
    enrollment_id = @EnrollmentID :: uuid;

-- name: InsertEnrollment :exec
INSERT INTO
    enrollments (
        enrollment_id,
        user_id,
        course_id,
        enrolled_at
    )
VALUES
    (
        @EnrollmentID :: uuid,
        @UserID :: uuid,
        @CourseID :: uuid,
        @EnrolledAt
    );

-- name: UpsertTopicProgress :exec
INSERT INTO
    topic_progresses (
        enrollment_id,
        course_section_topic_id,
        status
    )
VALUES
    (
        @EnrollmentID :: uuid,
        @CourseSectionTopicID :: uuid,
        @Status
    ) ON CONFLICT (enrollment_id, course_section_topic_id) DO
UPDATE
SET
    status = EXCLUDED.status;
